product_list.name: Apple iPhone 15
product_list.description: The Apple iPhone 15 features a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display, powered by the A16 Bionic chip. It includes a 48MP main camera, improved battery life, and USB-C charging.

product_list.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
product_list.description: Samsung Galaxy S24 comes with a 6.2-inch AMOLED display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, and a triple camera system with AI-powered photography.

product_list.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
product_list.description: Sony WH-1000XM5 offers industry-leading noise cancellation with up to 30 hours battery life and exceptional sound quality.

product_list.name: Apple MacBook Air M3
product_list.description: The MacBook Air with M3 chip delivers powerful performance with a fanless design, 18-hour battery life, and a stunning Retina display.

product_list.name: Dell XPS 13
product_list.description: Dell XPS 13 is a premium ultrabook with a 13.4-inch InfinityEdge display, Intel Core i7 processor, and sleek aluminum design.

product_list.name: Amazon Echo Dot 5th Gen
product_list.description: The Amazon Echo Dot 5th Gen is a compact smart speaker with Alexa voice assistant, improved sound quality, and smart home control.

product_list.name: Apple Watch Series 9
product_list.description: Apple Watch Series 9 includes advanced health tracking, ECG monitoring, and a bright always-on Retina display.

product_list.name: iPad Air M2
product_list.description: The iPad Air M2 provides powerful performance with a Liquid Retina display, Apple Pencil support, and lightweight design.

product_list.name: Logitech MX Master 3S
product_list.description: Logitech MX Master 3S is a premium wireless mouse designed for productivity with ultra-fast scrolling and customizable buttons.

product_list.name: Samsung 55-inch QLED 4K TV
product_list.description: Samsung 55-inch QLED TV offers stunning 4K resolution, Quantum Dot technology, and smart TV features with voice assistants.
